mapper.sql:
g.id AS goods_id, g.seller_id AS goods_seller_id, g.title AS goods_title, g.description AS goods_description, g.price AS goods_price, g.condition_level AS goods_condition_level, g.campus_location AS goods_campus_location, g.status AS goods_status, g.audit_remark AS goods_audit_remark, g.created_at AS goods_created_at, g.updated_at AS goods_updated_at,
s.id AS seller_id, s.email AS seller_email, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, s.avatar_url AS seller_avatar_url, s.failed_login_count AS seller_failed_login_count, s.locked_until AS seller_locked_until, s.created_at AS seller_created_at, s.updated_at AS seller_updated_at,
c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.sort_order AS category_sort_order, c.enabled AS category_enabled
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods_do (seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, condition_level, campus_location, status, audit_remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{conditionLevel}, #{campusLocation}, #{status}, #{auditRemark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE goods_do SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, condition_level = #{conditionLevel}, campus_location = #{campusLocation}, status = #{status}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE goods_do SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE goods_do SET status = #{status}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM goods_image_do WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM goods_image_do WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND audit_status = 'APPROVED'

SELECT
FROM goods_do g JOIN users s ON s.id = g.seller_id LEFT JOIN category_do c ON c.id = g.category_id WHERE g.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM goods_do g JOIN users s ON s.id = g.seller_id LEFT JOIN category_do c ON c.id = g.category_id WHERE (#{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(g.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(g.description) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')) AND (#{categoryId} IS NULL OR g.category_id = #{categoryId}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR g.status = #{status}) ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM goods_do g WHERE (#{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(g.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(g.description) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')) AND (#{categoryId} IS NULL OR g.category_id = #{categoryId}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR g.status = #{status})

SELECT
FROM goods_do g JOIN users s ON s.id = g.seller_id LEFT JOIN category_do c ON c.id = g.category_id WHERE g.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, goods_id, image_url, sort_order, audit_status, audit_remark, audited_by, audited_at, created_at FROM goods_image_do WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO goods_image_do (goods_id, image_url, sort_order, audit_status) VALUES
(#{goodsId}, #{img.imageUrl}, #{img.sortOrder}, #{img.auditStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE goods_image_do SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audited_by = #{auditedBy}, audited_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
